content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Resolved all 3 pending amendments from round-3 review for the success reconciliation handler (bead 9ni.8.5.1). All amendments targeted the fs-layer CompletionJournalDetails in src/adapters/fs.rs. Amendment 1: render() now passes self.task_id.as_deref() instead of None, so completion journal events serialized through the merge/repair code paths preserve the structured task_id linkage. Amendment 2: merge() now conflict-checks task_id via option_conflicts and merges it when the existing value is None, matching the pattern used for run_id, plan_hash, and outcome_detail. Amendment 3 (same scope as 1+2): The combined render() and merge() fixes ensure the fs-side journal dedupe/repair paths fully preserve and serialize task_id, closing the gap between the canonical model (model.rs) and the fs adapter layer.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Amendment 1: Changed CompletionJournalDetails::render() in fs.rs to pass self.task_id.as_deref() instead of None to render_completion_journal_details, so completion journal events going through merge or repair code paths retain the structured task_id
2. [Completed] Amendment 2: Added task_id conflict check (FsTaskRunLineageStore::option_conflicts on task_id) and merge (if merged.task_id.is_none()) to CompletionJournalDetails::merge() in fs.rs, preventing silent loss of task_id during journal event deduplication
3. [Completed] Verified all checks pass: cargo check (clean), cargo fmt --check (clean), cargo test automation_runtime::success_reconciliation (9 passed including e2e test with structural task_id assertion), cargo test journal_merge (1 passed confirming fs-layer merge logic)

## Validation Evidence

- cargo check: compiles cleanly
- cargo fmt --check: no formatting issues
- cargo test contexts::automation_runtime::success_reconciliation: 9 passed (8 unit + 1 end-to-end), 0 failed
- cargo test full suite: 756 passed, 1 failed (pre-existing flaky tmux_adapter_test that passes when run individually)
- Amendment 1 verified: render() at fs.rs:2863 passes self.task_id.as_deref() instead of None
- Amendment 2 verified: merge() at fs.rs:2832-2834 includes task_id conflict check; fs.rs:2849-2851 includes task_id merge block
- End-to-end test reconcile_success_end_to_end_updates_milestone continues to pass with structural task_id assertion (entry.task_id == Some('task-e2e-123'))

## Outstanding Risks

- The lineage task_id extraction still parses the 'task_id=<value>' format from outcome_detail in finalize_task_run_internal, backfill_terminal_entry, and replace_terminal_entry. This couples the fs adapter to a format defined in success_reconciliation.rs. A future refactor should thread task_id as a first-class parameter through the record_bead_completion/update_task_run chain to eliminate this format dependency.
- The bv --robot-next hint is still captured in-memory only and not persisted to disk — downstream consumers (selection step in 9ni.8.6) will need the ReconciliationOutcome returned by reconcile_success to act on the hint
